title: The Morning of the Execution
overview: The morning of the execution is the last moments of the lives of Tayyab Haj Rezaei and Haj Esmail Rezaei, who were sentenced to death following the uprising of June 15, 1342. The story of the film is told between 5 and 6:30 am this day.
